CVE-2014-4927.title: Buffer overflow in ACME micro_httpd, as used in D-Link DSL2750U a ...
CVE-2014-4927.description: Buffer overflow in ACME micro_httpd, as used in D-Link DSL2750U and DSL2740U and NetGear WGR614 and MR-ADSL-DG834 routers allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a long string in the URI in a GET request.
